revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing programmatically created pages and categories

revision.text: [[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] [[Category:bump February 13, 2025 bump]][[en:Select skin]][[Category:bump February 13, 2025 bump]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{view|}}}|View {{#if:{{{1|}}}|[[{{{1}}}]]|this page}} in the [[WP:Skin|skin]]:
}}{{hlist|class=inline noprint plainlinks nowraplinks|style={{{style|}}} |[https://en.m.wikipedia.org{{localurl:{{{1|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}|useskin=minerva}} {{int:skinname-minerva}}] (mobile) |[{{fullurl:{{{1|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}|useskin=monobook}} {{int:skinname-monobook}}] |[{{fullurl:{{{1|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}|useskin=timeless}} {{int:skinname-timeless}}] |[{{fullurl:{{{1|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}|useskin=vector}} {{int:skinname-vector}}] |[{{fullurl:{{{1|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}|useskin=vector-2022}} {{int:skinname-vector-2022}}] }} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{view|}}}|View {{#if:{{{1|}}}|[[{{{1}}}]]|this page}} in the [[WP:Skin|skin]]:

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23582763848|commit triggered pipeline]]
